ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the truck manufacturer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Manufacturer's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Manufacturer's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "truck_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each truck model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the manufacturer */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the truck model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the truck */,
  "engine_capacity" TEXT /* Engine capacity of the truck */,
  "maxpayload_capacity" TEXT /* Maximum payload capacity of the truck */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current production status of the truck model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_truck_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_years" (
  "production_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Production year */,
  "quarter1_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of quarter 1 */,
  "quarter1_end_date" TEXT /* End date of quarter 1 */,
  "quarter2_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of quarter 2 */,
  "quarter2_end_date" TEXT /* End date of quarter 2 */,
  "quarter3_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of quarter 3 */,
  "quarter3_end_date" TEXT /* End date of quarter 3 */,
  "quarter4_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of quarter 4 */,
  "quarter4_end_date" TEXT /* End date of quarter 4 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "truck_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the truck model */,
  "production_year_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the production year */,
  "quarter1_production" INTEGER /* Production units in quarter 1 */,
  "quarter2_production" INTEGER /* Production units in quarter 2 */,
  "quarter3_production" INTEGER /* Production units in quarter 3 */,
  "quarter4_production" INTEGER /* Production units in quarter 4 */,
  "total_production" INTEGER /* Total production units for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_truck_production_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES truck_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_truck_production_production_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_year_id") REFERENCES production_years ("production_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the production record */,
  "sales_year" INTEGER /* Sales year */,
  "quarter1_sales" INTEGER /* Sales units in quarter 1 */,
  "quarter2_sales" INTEGER /* Sales units in quarter 2 */,
  "quarter3_sales" INTEGER /* Sales units in quarter 3 */,
  "quarter4_sales" INTEGER /* Sales units in quarter 4 */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales units for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES truck_production ("production_id")
)
